metadata.description: Personal skill collection for Claude Code — iris CLI wrapper, NZ IR3 tax return, interactive timesheet, PDF→ebook, agentic / flow / math coaching — plus the Campaign Mode quest framework, the Six Animals advisory council, and the Mitchell Agentic Sprint validation pipeline.

plugins.name: iris
plugins.description: Drive the iris-cli command-line tool to search, browse, ask AI questions, and export content from an Iris architecture-knowledge repository (https://github.com/cgbarlow/iris). Triggers on iris/diagram/element/package/set/collection language and on `iris …` commands; walks install (uv tool), the SQLite-vs-Supabase login split, and the read/export/ask command surface.

plugins.name: ir3-tax-return
plugins.description: File a New Zealand individual IR3 income tax return for the 2026 tax year by driving the Inland Revenue myIR portal in the browser. Pauses for RealMe sign-in, refuses to click final Submit without explicit fresh consent, grounded in the official IR3G (March 2026) guide.

plugins.name: timesheet
plugins.description: Interactive timesheet entry — collects work description, date, and start/end times via prompts, calculates hours, and appends rows to `.campaign/timesheet.md`. Supports clock-in / clock-out shortcuts.

plugins.name: pdf-to-ebook
plugins.description: Convert a PDF file to ebook formats (epub, mobi, azw3/Kindle) using Calibre.

plugins.name: agentic-coach
plugins.description: Interactive prompt-engineering coach that elevates vague prompts through Socratic dialogue, multiple transformation styles, and guided learning.

plugins.name: flow-coach
plugins.description: Interactive claude-flow orchestration coach that guides users through swarm topology selection, agent deployment, memory configuration, and SPARC workflows.

plugins.name: math-coach
plugins.description: Coaching companion for a 13-year-old advanced math student. Triggers on math homework, screenshots of questions, or 'I'm stuck' moments. Refuses to give answers, hooks interest with basketball / anime / advanced-math connections, and gently catches him when he has skipped the workbook instructions.

plugins.name: six-animals
plugins.description: Six psychologically-grounded team role agents (Bear, Cat, Owl, Puppy, Rabbit, Wolf) plus Simon as educator/supervisor. Prerequisite for the full Campaign Mode experience.

plugins.name: campaign-mode
plugins.description: Quest-based extension for AI-assisted work. Three NPC agents (Gandalf, Dragon, Guardian) provide mentorship, adversarial testing, and quality gates for structured campaigns.

plugins.name: mitchell-agentic-sprint
plugins.description: AI-led 6-step sprint that walks an AI builder through validating one idea — vertical, buyers, framework, positioning — to a sales deck, outreach plan, and pre-seed investor deck. Adversarial by default; output is artifacts, not product. v0.3.2 makes explicit that the NotebookLM bolt-on is Claude Code CLI only and does NOT work in Claude Cowork (Cowork users use Claude-only synthesis, which works fully). Depends on six-animals + campaign-mode.
